description_long: This is a rustic log cabin with a steep, green shingled gable roof and a prominent stone chimney. The exterior walls are constructed from horizontally stacked logs, giving it a traditional, handcrafted appearance. The front facade features a small, uncovered porch with wooden steps and a single window beside the main door. The roof has a pronounced overhang and a slightly curved profile, adding to its quaint, storybook charm. There is a single window on the front and no visible windows on the sides or rear, emphasizing a simple, utilitarian design. The cabin sits on a raised wooden platform with some scattered debris, suggesting a weathered, lived-in character.
description: A rustic log cabin with a steep green shingled roof, stone chimney, and a small front porch. The structure features log walls, a single front window, and a raised wooden platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, a small porch, a single window, and the stone chimney rising from the roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, curved green shingled roof, log supports, and the open porch area with visible platform details.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the log wall construction, absence of windows, and the continuation of the green roof and chimney.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the extended roof, log supports, and a fenced area attached to the platform.
attribute_roof_type: steep gable roof with a pronounced curve and overhang, covered in green shingles, featuring a central stone chimney
attribute_window_arrangement: single small rectangular window on the front facade, asymmetrically placed to one side of the door; no windows visible on the sides or rear
attribute_door_placement: single exterior door centered on the front facade, adjacent to the window and opening onto the porch
